privileged_info_summary: The task creates a sales quotation in Odoo for customer 'Aurora Dynamics Inc.' with synthetic data dynamically created at runtime. The quotation contains 8 order lines: 2 section headers (Workstation Equipment and Technology & Peripherals), 4 products (20 Desks @ $749, 20 Chairs @ $489, 25 Laptops @ $1,299, 25 Mice @ $59), and 2 note lines (warranty and IT support agreement). The total quotation amount is $58,710.00. All data (customer, products, quotation) is generated by the setup script and does not reference external datasets.
